value.found_quote: Google's Gemini Computer Use, grown from Project Mariner, optimizes for browser workflows where DOM awareness and web-native actions outperform generic screen scraping.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "Gemini Computer Use" as a Google offering, with its own dedicated section ("Gemini Computer Use: Browser-Anchored"), inclusion in the capability comparison matrix, and repeated references throughout the article. The page treats it as a current, available product (not preview or beta), comparing it head-to-head with Claude Computer Use and OpenAI Codex Background Computer Use as of April 16, 2026.
